title.rationale: Canonical identifier for referencing the work.

authors.rationale: Credits contributors and helps in disambiguation.

year.rationale: Indicates the recency and relevance of the research.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research focus.

doi.rationale: Facilitates easy access to the published paper.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform where the research is published.

problem_statement.description: Description of the problem addressed in the paper
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the research gap or issue being tackled.

methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to address the problem.

survey.rationale: Describes how data was collected from participants.

demographics.rationale: Provides context for the responses received.

questions.description: List of questions asked in the survey
questions.rationale: Shows the focus areas of the survey.

analysis.description: Description of the analysis performed on survey data
analysis.rationale: Explains how the data was interpreted and conclusions drawn.

results.rationale: Highlights the outcomes of the research.

barriers.description: List of barriers identified for conducting error analysis

enabling_factors.description: Factors that could encourage error analysis
enabling_factors.rationale: Suggests ways to improve research practices.

participant_feedback.description: Feedback from participants regarding error analysis

discussion.rationale: Contextualizes results within the broader research landscape.

incentives.description: Discussion on incentives for conducting error analysis

reproducibility_metadata.description: Information on data and code availability
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Indicates how others can replicate the study.

data_availability.description: Details on where to access data used

code_availability.description: Information on the availability of code used in the study
